body.message: FINAL LOCK 015 addendum complete. All team feedback incorporated. GPT approved.
final_changes: Frozen status enum with RUNTIME_PREP_READY (never returned in LOCK 015)
Capabilities derived from PASS locks only
Safety boundaries (human-readable) vs safety_flags (booleans, all false)
Forbidden imports: http, fetch, openai, sqlite, express, etc.
Report must confirm: DATA SOURCE manual, READINESS RESULT GOVERNANCE_SPINE_READY, RUNTIME_PREP_READY RETURNED NO
